themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles discussing AI agents that can autonomously perform research tasks, make decisions, and interact with tools to achieve research goals.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content focused on AI tools that assist developers in writing, debugging, and understanding code.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Articles detailing specific AI-powered tools designed to aid researchers in various aspects of the research process.

themes.name: Synthetic users
themes.description: Discussions around AI-generated or AI-driven personas/users for testing, simulations, or research purposes.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Articles covering AI's ability to condense large amounts of text or data into concise summaries.

themes.name: AI product research
themes.description: Focuses on how AI is being applied to understand user needs, market trends, and inform product development.

themes.name: AI qualitative research
themes.description: Content related to AI's role in analyzing qualitative data like interviews, open-ended survey responses, and focus groups.

themes.name: AI usability testing
themes.description: Articles exploring how AI can automate or enhance the process of testing product usability.

themes.name: AI workforce impact
themes.description: Research and discussions on how AI is changing jobs, required skills, and the overall labor market.

themes.name: AI design research
themes.description: Articles about AI's application in understanding design principles, user preferences, and generating design concepts.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
